title: Incidental 49A / Real Estate Fish Stan Edits
about: Incidental 49A Fancam Edits or Real Estate Fish Stan Edits , also known as SpongeBob Real Estate Fish Edits , refers to a TikTok trend that started in early 2026, in which users make fancams of the purple real estate fish, officially referred to as Incidental 49A, from SpongeBob SquarePants . The edits are reminiscent of those on Stan Twitter , typically accompanied by pop or electronic music.
origin:
The real estate fish character, officially known as Incidental 49A due to the "incidental" naming convention employed by the SpongeBob SquarePants production team, most prominently appeared in season 1 episode 9b, titled "Opposite Day," airing in 1999, in which she is used to portray a real estate agent for Bikini Realty. [1]

In this memorable episode, the real estate agent grows increasingly frustrated over SpongeBob, Patrick and eventually Squidward's antics.

It is unknown when the first fancam edit of Incidental 49A was created, though the trend gained noticeable traction in on TikTok in February 2026.

On February 10th, 2026, TikTok [2] user @catharsis posted the earliest known edit of Incidental 49A, which received about 3 million views and 520,700 likes in less than two months.
